channel.title: Pokemon GO News & Events
channel.description: Official Pokemon GO + GO Hub + LeekDuck

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon GO Events This Week: May 25–31, 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s May 25-31 week sees us enter the final week of the season of Memories in Motion! GO Fest season begins with Tokyo, and Blanche quests for knowledge globally. Plus the weekly rotating Raid Hours, Dynamax Battles and Mega Raids. ⭐Highlights Raid Boss Change (May 27): Tapu Fini and Mega Medicham return to the raid pool. […]

The post Pokémon GO Events This Week: May 25–31, 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon GO Through the Years: 2016, The Year the World Walked
item.description:
The year is 2016. The world is buzzing. Leonardo DiCaprio finally claims his long-awaited Oscar. The Panama Papers send shockwaves across oceans. Donald Trump emerges as the Republican Party’s presumptive nominee. Portugal marches toward its historic first UEFA Euro victory. Amid all this, something unexpected is about to redefine gaming and reality itself. An augmented […]

The post Pokémon GO Through the Years: 2016, The Year the World Walked appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Chicago Community Ambassador Meet-ups
item.description:
Trainers headed to Pokémon GO Fest Chicago! A variety of local Community Ambassadors in the Chicago area will host meet-ups that you can join to play in safe, fun areas with other Trainers. This is a great way to play somewhere you don’t know well, and meet other trainers. There are meet ups on all […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Chicago Community Ambassador Meet-ups appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Tokyo
item.description:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Tokyo takes place from May 29 – June 1 at Tokyo Waterfront City and across Tokyo. Ticket holders receive exclusive gameplay, spawns, raids, and bonuses. Mega Mewtwo X and Y, along with Zeraora will make their Pokémon GO debut, along with Shiny Paldean Tauros. You will only be able to experience […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Tokyo appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] August Community Day 2026 Voting: Nickit, Yamper, Fidough and Tadbulb
item.description:
Pokémon GO are bringing back Community Day voting for the final Community Day of the Season! From Saturday, May 30, at 6:00 p.m. PDT to Sunday, May 31, at 6:00 p.m. PDT, you’ll be able to vote for the August Community Day featured Pokémon via the official Pokémon GO YouTube channel. The Pokémon that receives […]

The post August Community Day 2026 Voting: Nickit, Yamper, Fidough and Tadbulb appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Dynamax Inkay Max Monday: Event Guide
item.description:
Max Monday features a different Pokémon in power spots for the whole day. Inkay Max Monday takes place on June 1st, 2026. This Max Monday is the first June Pokémon, and it is the return of Dynamax Inkay!  Dynamax Inkay is a and type which means it is only weak to and type moves. It is […]

The post Dynamax Inkay Max Monday: Event Guide appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Nickit is your August 2026 Community Day Vote Winner!
item.description:
Pokémon GO brought Community Day voting back for the August 2026 Community Day! From Saturday, May 30, at 6:00 p.m. PDT to Sunday, May 31, at 6:00 p.m. PDT, you could vote for the August Community Day featured Pokémon via the official Pokémon GO YouTube channel. The Pokémon that received the most votes is the […]

The post Nickit is your August 2026 Community Day Vote Winner! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] GO Pass: June 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s June 2026 GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe feature exclusive rewards, including an encounter with Lugia, XP and Stardust bonuses, and the return of the Timed Incubator! This is the first GO Pass of the Forever Forward season. Trainers can earn GO Points by completing Pass Tasks, unlock milestone rewards through ranking up, and access […]

The post GO Pass: June 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon Champions Mobile Release Date Announced Along With The Debut Of Mega Raichu
item.description:
Good day, Pokémon trainers! If you’ve kept any track on recent VGC or Pokémon news at all, you might have already heard of Pokémon Champions, the game released earlier this year on the Nintendo Switch lineup of consoles. It’s a PvP-focused game, taking the turn-based battles of the mainline series and making competing with other […]

The post Pokémon Champions Mobile Release Date Announced Along With The Debut Of Mega Raichu appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Chicago
item.description:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Chicago takes place from June 5-7 at Grant Park and across Chicago. Ticket holders receive exclusive gameplay, spawns, raids, and bonuses. Mega Mewtwo X, Mega Mewtwo Y, and Zeraora will make their Pokémon GO debut, along with Shiny Paldean Tauros. You will only be able to experience the event gameplay within […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Chicago appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Dynamax Electabuzz Max Monday: Event Guide
item.description:
Electabuzz Max Monday takes place on June 8th, 2026 from from 6 PM to 7 PM local time. This Max Monday is the second June Pokémon, and it is the debut of Dynamax Electabuzz! Dynamax Electabuzz is an type which means it is only weak to type moves. It is a Tier 3 Dynamax Battle. […]

The post Dynamax Electabuzz Max Monday: Event Guide appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon GO Is Testing a Built-In Auto-Catcher Item
item.description:
Scopely appears to be testing the Explorer Gadget, a new Pokémon GO item that works similarly to a built-in GO Plus. The Explorer Gadget was first discovered through datamining earlier this year, where it was described as an in-game item capable of automatically throwing Poké Balls and spinning PokéStops. The feature now appears to be […]

The post Pokémon GO Is Testing a Built-In Auto-Catcher Item appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Did Pokémon GO Scans Help Build Drone Tech?
item.description:
Reports from Dutch newspaper Trouw and subsequent coverage from drone and technology outlets have raised questions about whether data gathered through Pokémon GO’s optional AR scanning feature helped train technology that could now be relevant to drone navigation, including military and defense use cases. The concern is not that Pokémon GO itself is controlling drones, […]

The post Did Pokémon GO Scans Help Build Drone Tech? appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] LEGO Stores x Pokémon GO Stamp Rally, Raids and More!
item.description:
Trainers in the US, UK, Poland, France, Germany, and Australia can join in the Lego fun with in person activities, and special raids, research and a stamp rally in Pokémon GO, with adventures at participating LEGO Store locations between August 3 and September 30, 2026*. The following Pokémon will appear more frequently in raids at […]

The post LEGO Stores x Pokémon GO Stamp Rally, Raids and More! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Choose Your Path Timed Research, Daily Discovery Updates, Spotlight Hour Returns!
item.description:
Non-event weeks will no longer be a bore in Pokémon GO, as the Choose Your Path Timed Research will let Trainers experience the game in the way they want! Through the Choose Your Path Timed Research, you’ll get the option to pick one of three paths: Explore, Catch, or Battle. What you choose will decide […]

The post Choose Your Path Timed Research, Daily Discovery Updates, Spotlight Hour Returns! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon Champions Now Available For Mobile Devices!
item.description:
Good day, Pokémon trainers! It’s finally time, after months of waiting, Pokémon Champions is now available on Android and iOS devices! If you’ve been eager to participate in thrilling battles with your favorite Pokémon on your smartdevice, now is your chance. You can get Pokémon Champions by downloading it frome either the Google Play or […]

The post Pokémon Champions Now Available For Mobile Devices! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Fossil Fun Timed Research: All Paths, Tasks and Rewards
item.description:
Choose Your Path: Fossil Fun is a special Timed Research in Pokémon GO, available from Wednesday, June 17, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. local time until Sunday, June 21, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. local time. This is part of the Forever Forward Season’s Choose Your Path Timed Research series, which gives Trainers a way to customize […]

The post Fossil Fun Timed Research: All Paths, Tasks and Rewards appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon News Weekly Roundup: Champions Free Gifts, Worlds Promos and PokémonXP Reveals
item.description:
Welcome to your ‘other’ Pokémon News Weekly Round Up, volume 1! Each week I’ll round up the best Pokémon news (that isn’t Pokémon GO related) from around the globe and other games, and share it here. Pokémon Champions kicks off the Monthly Challenge Series starting with June 2026! This competition takes place Friday, June 26, […]

The post Pokémon News Weekly Roundup: Champions Free Gifts, Worlds Promos and PokémonXP Reveals appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon GO Events This Week: June 22-28, 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s June 22-28 week sees us well into the season of Forever Forward! We end June on a high with a trio of events, Flying Taxi, a Team GO Rocket Takeover, and Mega Skamory raid day! Plus the weekly rotating Raid Hours, Spotlight Hour, Dynamax Battles and Mega Raids. ⭐Highlights Raid Boss Change (June […]

The post Pokémon GO Events This Week: June 22-28, 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] City Safari Events Coming to New Locations in September 2026!
item.description:
Get hyped trainers, a whole batch of City Safari events have been announced for across the globe in September 2026! Explore different cities around the world with location-themed wild encounters and Special Research September 26th to 27th 2026. These events are coming to the following locations: Boston, USA Brisbane, Australia Lisbon, Portugal Marseille, France Munich, […]

The post City Safari Events Coming to New Locations in September 2026! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon GO GBL PvP Trainer Battle Update Going Live
item.description:
Earlier in 2026 Pokémon GO announced that it would be making updates and changes to the Pokémon GO PvP battle system in their PvP update announcement. The aim behind this major update was to strengthen Trainer Battles by rebuilding the core battle system so that battles consistently reflect player skill, whilst also maintaining the […]

The post Pokémon GO GBL PvP Trainer Battle Update Going Live appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon News Weekly Roundup: Pokémon Tales Artwork, Pokopia Plushies, Rayquaza theme for TCG and More!
item.description:
This weeks exciting Pokémon news comes from across the franchise, including newly released artwork for an upcoming tv series, new Pokémon in UNITE, Rayquaza featured for Pokémon TCG & TCG Pocket, Pokémon Café Remix, new Pokopia merch and more! During the Annecy International Animation Film Festival in France, the Director of Original Animation at The Pokémon […]

The post Pokémon News Weekly Roundup: Pokémon Tales Artwork, Pokopia Plushies, Rayquaza theme for TCG and More! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon GO Events This Week: June 29 – July 5, 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s June 29 – July 5 week sees us enter the second month of the season of Forever Forward! We end June and kick off July with 10th Anniversary celebrations and Sobble Community Day! Plus the weekly rotating Raid Hours, Spotlight Hour, Dynamax Battles and Mega Raids. ⭐Highlights Raid Boss Change (July 1): Articuno, Zapdos, Moltres  and […]

The post Pokémon GO Events This Week: June 29 – July 5, 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] GO Pass: July 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s July 2026 GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe feature exclusive rewards, including an encounter with Ho-Oh, XP and Stardust bonuses, and the return of the PokéCoins rewards! This is the second GO Pass of the Forever Forward season. To celebrate the 10th Anniversary of Pokémon GO additional items and encounters will be available beyond […]

The post GO Pass: July 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] July 2026 Pokémon GO Events
item.description:
The Pokémon GO July 2026 events schedule is here! In July, featured Pokémon are Solgaleo, Kyurem and Mega Aggron. A variety of different Pokémon will be featured throughout the month, and there is a whole host of in-game events to look forward to! Here are all the major events happening in July 2026 in Pokémon GO, […]

The post July 2026 Pokémon GO Events appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] New In-Game Pokémon GO Event Calendar!
item.description:
Pokémon GO is introducing the event calendar which aims to be a new central location for discovering, learning more about, and planning your participation in events and community meetups. The Today View has also been streamlined with the intention of keep your daily goals more central and focused. You can access the new event calendar […]

The post New In-Game Pokémon GO Event Calendar! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon GO Incubators Reportedly Removed in Brazil Following Loot Box Ruling
item.description:
Pokémon GO players in Brazil are reporting that Egg Incubators, some item boxes, and certain paid passes are no longer available or usable in the game, following a recent Brazilian court ruling against loot box mechanics in games accessible to minors. The change appears to be connected to Brazil’s wider crackdown on gambling-like mechanics in […]

The post Pokémon GO Incubators Reportedly Removed in Brazil Following Loot Box Ruling appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Pokémon GO Events This Week: July 6-12, 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s July 6-12 week sees us will into the season of Forever Forward! This is the biggest week of the year in Pokémon GO, with the Road of Legends and global GO Fest taking place! Plus the weekly rotating Raid Hours, Spotlight Hour, Dynamax Battles and Mega Raids. If you play only one week […]

The post Pokémon GO Events This Week: July 6-12, 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Road of Legends Day 1: All Five-Star Raids, Rayquaza, Mega Salamence, Bonuses and Guides
item.description:
Road of Legends is a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final prep event before GO Fest Global weekend. Trainers will […]

The post Road of Legends Day 1: All Five-Star Raids, Rayquaza, Mega Salamence, Bonuses and Guides appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub] Niantic Games Team Now Officially Called Scopely Explore
item.description:
Today, 6th July 2026, the Niantic games team officially updates its name to Scopely Explore. As part of the rebrand they intend to debut a new look. They have shared that the Pokémon GO team remains the same, as does their commitment to creating the best gameplay experiences for Trainers everywhere. It has been more […]

The post Niantic Games Team Now Officially Called Scopely Explore appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.description: Artículo oficial de Pokémon GO: ¡El nuevo calendario de eventos lleva vuestras aventuras de Pokémon GO a otro nivel!
